description_long: This object is a stylized mushroom with a large, wide cap that is bright red and adorned with several large, irregular white spots. The cap is slightly domed and flares outward, creating a broad overhang above the stem. The stem is thick, tapering downward, and colored in muted shades of brown and beige, giving it a natural, organic appearance. The underside of the cap is not visible, so the presence of gills cannot be confirmed. The overall form is reminiscent of the iconic Amanita muscaria, often found in storybook illustrations. The surface of the cap appears matte and smooth, with a soft, semi-firm texture typical of many mushrooms.
description: A large, red-capped mushroom with white spots and a thick, beige-brown stem. The cap is wide and smooth, with a classic toadstool appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the red cap with three prominent white spots and the thick stem centered below.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cap's downward slope and the stem's tapering, with two white spots visible on the cap.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broadest part of the cap with four white spots and the stem's split base.
description_view_3: Angled side view highlights the cap's overhang and curvature, with three white spots visible.
